name: chain__how_are_you_building_up_brand_mentions_
method: how are you building up brand mentions in llms? trying to come up with an aeo strategy for my saas startup and realized i was really on the wrong track researching things like how to get cited as a s

stages.task: Query Perplexity and ChatGPT with 50 niche-relevant questions (faith apps, streak apps, productivity tools, MCP marketplace), log which competitors get cited and which queries have no good answer
For each uncited opportunity, generate structured content (FAQ schema, comparison tables, how-to with specific tool names) optimized for LLM retrieval
Post answers to Reddit (target subs), dev.to, Medium, GitHub discussions — places Perplexity crawls. Include natural brand mentions of our apps/tools
Re-query same questions weekly, track if our content now appears in LLM responses, measure citation delta
